ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region to which the country belongs */,
  "happiness_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country in the happiness report */,
  "happiness_score" REAL /* Happiness score of the country */,
  "whisker_high" REAL /* High whisker value for the country's happiness score */,
  "whisker_low" REAL /* Low whisker value for the country's happiness score */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp_total" REAL /* Total GDP of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was last updated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country's capital or a central point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country's capital or a central point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the factor (e.g., Economy, Family, Health) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the factor */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the factor in calculating happiness scores */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the factor */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the factor data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the factor data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_factors" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the factor */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the factor value is recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the factor for the country */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the factor value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "factor_id", "year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_factors_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource to which the permission applies */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
